# Ui.DenyByDefaultCsp property

The deny-by-default CSP a host MUST apply when a UI resource omits `csp`: every directive an empty list (spec §26.4, R-26.4-h).

```csharp
public static UiContentSecurityPolicy DenyByDefaultCsp { get; }
```
